title: Played Express
description: Adds Player Facial Expressions, Eye Movement, Blinking, Eyebrow Movement, and other Animations in Alpha using EMF & ETF
body:
# Summary
Played Express is a Minecraft Resource Pack that adds player eye **movement** and **expressions**. _Player animations in alpha_
# Dependencies
Played Express requires **EMF & ETF** to be able to change the player's model and animations.
# Tutorial on Expressions
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/kYZpcR1SWsw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![How to use Played Express](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c47684d41988281ae5976de418199125175eae5.png)
- Played Express **does not** interfere with the default Minecraft player model.
- When in a server, players without Played Express will see you as **normal**, and you will see players without Played Express as **normal**.
- The Model contains Left, Right, and Middle pupils, Left and Right Eye bases, Left and Right Eyebrows, and Base to **cover** up the **face**.
# Models & Textures provided
Played Express **provides** the player model, and player_slim model for **user convenience**. These are in the **supplementary** files of the download.

# Feedback & Issue Tracker
[Feedback Forms](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfFQlaHX7Jl3tGuROLMDdfaiUeiOCS7eop8QNYGaajw3CFQoA/viewform?usp=dialog)
